title: swarm-do telemetry finding record v2
description: One row per finding surfaced by a swarm review role. v2 adds stable_finding_hash_v1, duplicate_cluster_id, short_summary. run_id relaxed to match runs.v1 pattern. Phase 10a (mstefanko-plugins-utu) will tighten run_id back to strict Crockford ULID.

run_id.description: Identifier of the parent runs.jsonl row. Relaxed pattern matches the Phase 9a hex generator; Phase 10a (mstefanko-plugins-utu) will tighten to strict Crockford ULID ^[0-9A-HJKMNP-TV-Z]{26}$.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the finding was recorded

category.description: Finding category (e.g. correctness, security, performance, style)

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the finding

short_summary.description: Normalized short summary: leading verb stripped, trimmed. Used as input to stable_finding_hash_v1.

file_path.description: Repo-relative file path where the finding applies. null if not file-specific.

line_start.description: First line number of the affected region. null if not applicable.

line_end.description: Last line number of the affected region. null if not applicable.

schema_ok.description: True = writer attests the row conforms to this schema.

stable_finding_hash_v1.description: SHA-256 of (file_normalized, category_class, line_start/10, normalized_summary_tokens). Null if file_path is null or line_start is null. Do NOT change the algorithm without bumping to stable_finding_hash_v2.

duplicate_cluster_id.description: Cluster identifier assigned by the indexer (Phase 9e) post-hoc. Always null on append; stamped during rebuild-index. Never set by the extractor.
